description_long: This is a deep blue baseball cap with a structured, six-panel design and a gently curved brim. The crown is rounded and features small ventilation eyelets on each panel for breathability. The front of the cap is smooth and unadorned, lacking any visible logos or decorative elements. The back of the cap has an open section, likely for an adjustable strap, which is typical for this style. The stitching is visible along the seams and brim, adding subtle texture to the otherwise uniform surface. The material appears to be a soft, flexible fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A deep blue, six-panel baseball cap with a curved brim and open back for adjustment. The cap is plain, with visible stitching and ventilation eyelets.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smooth, rounded crown and curved brim, with no visible logos or decorations.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the cap's structured panels, curved brim, and ventilation eyelets.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the open back section, likely for an adjustable strap, and the rounded crown.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the panel seams, curved brim, and eyelets.
